# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
PickNgo connects thrift shoppers with on-demand delivery across North Carolina. Browse marketplace listings, buy local furniture, and get it delivered same-day.

### Marketplace
https://example.com/marketplace
Discover curated marketplace listings from Goodwill, Habitat Restore, Facebook Marketplace, and Craigslist sellers. Secure escrow payments protect every purchase.

### Delivery
https://example.com/delivery
Get superstore online shopping and delivery for your thrift finds. We transport items from Goodwill, Facebook Marketplace, or any local seller directly to your door.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Need help with marketplace listings or delivery? Contact PickNgo for instant quotes on furniture transport and join our growing community of thrift enthusiasts.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
